companyInfo.name: Frowear Productions 2026
companyInfo.heroEyebrow: Friendly websites. Useful systems. Clear next steps.
companyInfo.heroTitle: Simple digital products for growing teams and families of users.
companyInfo.heroDescription: Frowear builds bright, easy-to-use websites, admin tools, APIs, and platform features with practical backend structure.
companyInfo.companyHeading: A focused studio for product-ready builds.
companyInfo.companyIntro: Projects, services, opportunities, and profiles are editable from one admin backend.
companyInfo.companyNarrative: The studio turns ideas into usable product surfaces: landing pages, dashboards, collaboration tools, project portals, and integrations.
companyInfo.responseWindow: Free quote replies within two business days

branding.positioning: Simple modern UI with practical engineering execution.
branding.voice: Warm, clear, modern, and easy to understand.

services.title: Websites
services.description: Marketing sites, launch pages, service experiences, portals, and premium UI refreshes.

services.title: Complete Systems
services.description: Dashboards, client systems, internal tools, approvals, workflows, and reporting interfaces.

services.title: APIs
services.description: Structured service layers, backend contracts, event logic, integrations, and connected data.

services.title: Integrations
services.description: Payments, CRM, scheduling, notifications, analytics, and partner platform connections.

services.title: Design Systems
services.description: Reusable interface language, visual rules, spacing systems, and high-clarity components.

services.title: Talent Platforms
services.description: Profiles, opportunities, project applications, company matching, and collaboration-ready records.

skills.name: Frontend Architecture
skills.summary: Responsive interfaces, interaction systems, and UI patterns built to stay clear under real product growth.

skills.name: System Design
skills.summary: Operational thinking across user roles, states, handoffs, and the internal logic behind working products.

skills.name: API Integration
skills.summary: Reliable service connections for CRM, payments, reporting, automation, and external platform workflows.

skills.name: Visual Design Direction
skills.summary: High-tech presentation, polished layout rhythm, and stronger hierarchy for modern digital products.

skills.name: Admin Workflows
skills.summary: Content editing surfaces and internal controls for teams that need to update real business information.

skills.name: Marketplace Planning
skills.summary: Data structures for companies, talent, opportunities, applications, and project participation.

opportunities.title: New Website Build
opportunities.summary: A fresh digital presence for a launch, service business, or product-facing brand.

opportunities.title: System Modernization
opportunities.summary: Replace fragmented tools with a cleaner internal interface and connected workflow.

opportunities.title: Integration Sprint
opportunities.summary: Connect payments, CRM, scheduling, analytics, and customer follow-up systems.

opportunities.title: Retained Product Support
opportunities.summary: Ongoing UI, feature, and system refinement for teams with continuing product work.

projects.title: Launch Platform
projects.alt: Developer workstation showing a modern website interface and code editor
projects.summary: A product-facing site with sharp storytelling, strong conversion paths, and a faster visual system across every key page.
points: Landing flow, feature sections, and quote capture
Responsive UI tuned for mobile and desktop clarity

projects.title: Ops Command Center
projects.alt: Team collaborating in front of multiple dashboards and system screens
projects.summary: A complete working system for teams managing delivery, approvals, client status, and service performance in one connected interface.
points: Clear handoff logic for internal teams and clients

projects.title: Service Layer
projects.alt: Close-up technology hardware representing backend API and service infrastructure
projects.summary: An API-first build that exposes clean endpoints, event logic, and reliable data movement between products, partners, and reporting tools.

projects.title: Connected Revenue Flow
projects.alt: Analytics dashboard and charts used for business integration monitoring
projects.summary: A customer and finance integration that joins purchase activity, fulfillment signals, analytics, and notifications into one reliable operating picture.
points: CRM, payments, and reporting connected end to end
Operational alerts surfaced inside a clean UI

projects.title: Interactive Control Surface
projects.alt: High-tech digital interface with illuminated controls for a custom project
projects.summary: A custom interface for a high-visibility internal tool where interaction design, motion, and engineering quality all need to land together.
points: Dynamic views for live state and fast operator action
Custom components tuned to the workflow itself

projects.title: Signature Experience Site
projects.alt: Creative product team shaping a premium digital experience together
projects.summary: A visually driven build for brands that need a stronger presence, better pacing, and a more memorable first impression without losing usability.
points: Immersive section transitions and clear content hierarchy
Design system patterns ready to scale past launch
